commands.review_summary:
The branch carries message-tool-only delivery context through agent run context and emits local chat/transcript diagnostics for suppressed room-event failures.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main suppresses message-tool-only room-event final replies without a transcript mirror, and gateway lifecycle events lack the run-context fields needed to emit the proposed diagnostic. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer PR with no blocking patch finding; the remaining action is maintainer validation, the interrupted test rerun, and a decision on live room-event proof rather than a narrow automated repair.

target.title: surface message-tool-only diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- Carry message-tool-only delivery mode, prompt-persistence suppression, and inbound event kind through agent run context.
- Surface non-deliverable message-tool-only lifecycle endings as chat error diagnostics for GUI/TUI consumers.
- Mirror suppressed message-tool-only room-event error payloads into the local session transcript so the failure remains visible without sending an automatic Telegram/channel fallback.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/agent-events.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts -t "message-tool-only"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts -t "diagnostic messages"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts -t "mirrors suppressed message-tool-only room event failures"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts -t "suppresses prompt persistence for internal handoffs"`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts -t "does not reuse or persist CLI sessions for room-event turns"`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-command.ts src/agents/agent-command.live-model-switch.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts src/infra/agent-events.ts src/infra/agent-events.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts`
- `git diff --cached --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: message-tool-only room-event failures no longer disappear from both the source channel and local chat history; the GUI/TUI receives a diagnostic and suppressed error payloads are mirrored into the session transcript.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout using targeted `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs` lanes and repo formatter checks.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: the commands listed in Verification were run locally; the final post-format rerun of the dispatch mirror test was interrupted because the test wrapper spent over two minutes in transform startup, but the same focused test passed before formatting and formatting only rewrapped test/source expressions.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed for agent run-context merging, gateway chat diagnostic emission, UI error-message append handling, dispatch transcript mirroring, agent-command context propagation, and agent-runner room-event handling.

Observed result after fix: non-deliverable message-tool-only lifecycle endings produce `state: "error"` chat payloads with assistant diagnostic messages, and suppressed room-event error replies append a durable transcript diagnostic instead of sending a Telegram/channel fallback.
target.author: amknight
